title: SUPPORTIVE HOUSING - 211info
text: HOUSING AND DEVELOPMENT SUPPORTIVE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of affordable housing options, including transitional housing and permanent supportive housing. These options combine affordable housing with essential services such as health care, recovery support, employment assistance, and veteran services. Also provides subsidized rental units to help ensure long-term housing stability 523 NW Everett Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals and families experiencing homelessness, individuals in recovery, those struggling with mental health challenges, living with HIV/AIDS or other disabling conditions, and/or a history of criminal involvement, and veterans experiencing homelessness Hours: Varies by property Email (503) 548-4931 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Housing Rapid Response Front Desk (503) 548-4931 Reception (503) 525-8483 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Housing waitlist availabilities are updated Monday mornings. FEES: Varies by property LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Homeless Permanent Supportive Housing Homeless Permanent Supportive Housing * Homeless Families Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Homeless Families Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses * Homeless Families Sober Living Homes Sober Living Homes * Homeless Families Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
